transforms.code:
rows = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(value) or []
	out = []
	for i, r in enumerate(rows):
		r = dict(r or {})
		r['rowIndex'] = i
		out.append({'row': r})
	return out

customMethods.name: load
handleSave
handleDiscard
customMethods.script:
selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.selected) or {"rows": []}
	self.view.custom.state = {"selected": selected, "editDraft": {"rows": [dict(r) for r in (selected.get("rows") or [])]}}

customMethods.name: addRow
_applyNumberChange
_applyDescChange
_applyStatusChange
_removeRow

messageHandlers.script:
if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyNumberChange(idx, payload.get("newNumber"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyDescChange(idx, payload.get("newDesc"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyStatusChange(idx, payload.get("newStatus"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._removeRow(idx)
